title: Build the root app shell and Overview surface
summary: Create the first working vertical slice with route state, app shell, and a read-only Overview screen mirroring the dashboard.
scope: Add root route model for Overview, Projects, Agents, Tasks, Review
Build macOS/iPad sidebar and iPhone tab-bar shell
Implement Overview data loading from existing Sloppy APIs
Add navigation from overview cards into detail routes
deliverables: Overview screen with live-fetching read model
acceptance_criteria: App can launch into Overview on macOS and iOS
Navigation actions from Overview change routes correctly
